summary: Iteration 14 - Tested document folder categories display and document deletion functionality for both Admin and Client views. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET after DELETE returns 404 'Documento non trovato'
✅ Admin Frontend: Cartelle/Lista toggle present and functional
✅ Admin Frontend: All 8 folder categories displayed (Documenti, Agencia Tributaria, Seguridad Social, Ayuntamiento, Contratti, Atti, Registro Mercantil, Fatture Fornitori)
✅ Admin Frontend: 'Nuova Categoria' button visible for admin
✅ Admin Frontend: 'Seleziona' button visible when documents exist (totalDocs > 0)
✅ Admin Frontend: 'Seleziona' button hidden when no documents (totalDocs = 0)
✅ Admin Frontend: Year filter 'Tutti gli anni' present
✅ Admin Frontend: Trash icon (delete button) visible for each document
✅ Admin Frontend: Single delete confirmation dialog shows document name, file name, warning message, and 'Elimina Documento'/'Annulla' buttons
✅ Admin Frontend: Multiple selection mode shows 'Elimina Selezionati', selection count badge, and 'Annulla'
✅ Admin Frontend: 'Seleziona tutti' option in expanded folder
✅ Client Frontend: All 8 folder categories displayed
✅ Client Frontend: 'Nuova Categoria' button NOT visible (correct - admin only)
✅ Client Frontend: Year filter 'Tutti gli anni' present
✅ Client Frontend: DocumentFolderBrowser component properly integrated
✅ Client Frontend: Empty state 'Nessun documento' displayed when no documents
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentFolderBrowser.jsx correctly implements canDelete for both 'commercialista' and 'cliente' roles
'Nuova Categoria' button correctly shows only for userRole='commercialista'
'Seleziona' button correctly shows only when totalDocs > 0
Delete confirmation dialogs (single and multiple) have proper styling and messaging

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all features verified for Admin and Client views)

seed_data_creation: TEST_UI_DELETE document created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified: 1) DELETE /api/documents/{id} endpoint works (returns 200 on delete, 404 after delete). 2) Admin view (ClientDetail.jsx) shows folder browser with all 8 categories, Cartelle/Lista toggle, year filter, 'Nuova Categoria' button, 'Seleziona' button (when docs exist), and trash icon for single delete. 3) Delete confirmation dialog shows document name, file name, and proper warning. 4) Selection mode shows 'Elimina Selezionati' button and count badge. 5) Client view (ClientDashboard.jsx) shows same folder browser BUT without 'Nuova Categoria' button (admin only). 6) Client can still see delete functionality (trash icon, selection mode) when documents exist.

backend_delete_endpoint.description: DELETE /api/documents/{id} deletes document and returns appropriate response

admin_folder_view.description: ClientDetail.jsx shows folder browser with all features including Nuova Categoria

admin_single_delete.description: Trash icon triggers confirmation dialog with document details

admin_multiple_delete.description: Selection mode with 'Elimina Selezionati' button and confirmation dialog

client_folder_view.description: ClientDashboard.jsx shows folder browser with all 8 categories

client_nuova_categoria_hidden.description: 'Nuova Categoria' button correctly NOT visible for clients

client_delete_capability.description: Clients can delete documents (when documents exist) - 'Seleziona' button will appear
